scripts.test: bun test tests/normalizer.test.ts tests/parsers.test.ts tests/inference.test.ts tests/auditStore.test.ts tests/integration.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e: bash -lc 'PORT=3100 API_KEY=test-api-key RATE_LIMIT_MAX=10000 bun run src/index.ts >/tmp/cleanstream-e2e.log 2>&1 & PID=$!; trap "kill $PID 2>/dev/null || true" EXIT; for i in {1..50}; do curl -sf http://localhost:3100/health >/dev/null && break; sleep 0.2; done; API_URL=http://localhost:3100 API_KEY=test-api-key bun test tests/e2e*.test.ts'
scripts.test:all: bun run test && bun run test:e2e
scripts.lint: bun run format:check && bun run typecheck
scripts.ci: bun run lint && bun run test
